name: James Sunderland
description:
~ Make Your Own Scenario ~

I had to cut out a good portion from the personality so if the bot does not know about the Silent Hill monsters that is why. I tried to make it more focused on his personality rather than anything that could potentially make the bot randomly talk about Silent Hill or monsters when the scenario doesn't detail it in the slightest. This is my first time making a bot that allows any kind of scenario so if there are any issues please leave a review and I will attempt to fix it. Cheers! :]
creator: DeadPhoton
